intro: This is a list of foundational ideas I think might be true.

themes.name: Decision Making
ideas: Steer into the pain
Occam's razor means the explanation requiring fewest assumptions is probably right—it's about probabilities, not simplicity
Johnson's razor: what must be true? what must remain true? what would make this entirely untrue?
Optimization necessarily trades off for fragility

themes.name: Accountability
ideas: Accountability cannot be given, it can only be taken
Accountability means being responsible for the pain of fixing it when things go wrong
Necessary alignment: Accountability ↔ Responsibility ↔ Authority

themes.name: Thinking
ideas: Intelligence: ability to transform information into effective action
The map is not the territory—all models are wrong, some are useful
We are haunted by dead ideas and lifeless old beliefs from past generations
Intelligence is an emergent property of language, not originating from human brains but running on them

themes.name: Communication
ideas: Memes are crucial for spreading messages and creating cohesion online
On the internet, every idea can find an audience and every audience can find an idea

themes.name: Finance & Economics
ideas: Finance abstracts to two axes: speed of insights and depth of insights
Finance represents time travel for value—pulling tomorrow's value forward
For the first time, the cost of getting attention is greater than the cost of producing content

themes.name: Emotion & Relationships
ideas: Criticisms represent requests the critic didn't feel comfortable making directly
Anger is a derivative emotion of fear
Don't mistake high bandwidth for fully knowing someone in close relationships
We bring new context into relationships—embrace the unknowable

themes.name: Being
ideas: Fundamental conflict: desire for freedom vs need to belong
One has time for everything they do—trouble making time is trouble making choices
Identity is defined by interests where one can legitimately compete for status
Life optimizes for Flow or State, not both—Flow is dynamic, State is static
Possessions make us happy when they promote social connections, get us outdoors, or keep us active

themes.name: Systems
ideas: Decentralization increases innovation at the expense of efficiency
Centralization increases efficiency at the expense of fragility
Statistical probabilities are meaningless in complex deterministic systems
Cannot make complex systems deterministic by narrowing aperture
Vertical integration increases decision speed by reducing coordination costs
Speed allows quick tests and fast failures, enabling more risk-taking for non-linear outcomes
Inclusive nationalism based on principles rather than static identities supports liberal democracy
